description_long: This is a sleek, modern coupe car with a striking custom paint job featuring a galaxy or starfield pattern across its entire exterior. The car has a low, aerodynamic profile, with a pronounced front bumper, sculpted hood, and wide fenders. Its roofline is smooth and continuous, flowing into a rear spoiler that enhances its sporty appearance. The wheels are large, multi-spoke alloys, and the side mirrors are compact and streamlined. The rear of the car features a vented engine cover, dual exhausts, and a visible Union Jack motif on the license plate area. The windows are tinted, and the interior appears to have racing-style seats and a minimalist dashboard.
description: A sporty coupe car with a galaxy-themed paint job, large alloy wheels, and a rear spoiler, exuding a modern and dynamic look.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the galaxy paint, sculpted hood, front bumper, and part of the rear spoiler.
description_view_1: Side-front angle highlighting the car's low stance, alloy wheels, and the full effect of the starfield pattern.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view displaying the vented engine cover, rear spoiler, dual exhausts, and Union Jack motif.
description_view_3: Side-rear angle emphasizing the smooth roofline, rear fender, and the continuation of the galaxy pattern.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
